articles.title: Darlington man jailed for dousing neighbours in petrol and threatened to set them on fire
articles.description: Ryan Love, 31, armed himself with two knives before entering a home in Darlington where he doused a couple and their friend with petrol and threatened to set them alight

articles.title: Rachel Reeves confirms £120 discount for drivers after being accused of 'doing nothing'
articles.description: It is hoped petrol costs will fall.

articles.title: Rupee Recovery Boosts Market Mood, FPIs Likely To Return As Foreign Selling Pressure Eases
articles.description: Foreign portfolio investors may return to Indian markets as the rupee strengthens and market fundamentals improve. Analysts say easing foreign selling, strong corporate earnings, and lower crude oil prices are supporting sentiment, although weak monsoon conditions remain a concern for economic growth.
